name: HANMI FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Hanmi Financial Corporation is the holding company for Hanmi Bank, a community bank serving multi-ethnic communities, particularly Korean-Americans. The bank offers commercial real estate loans, SBA loans, commercial and industrial loans, trade finance, and retail banking products including deposits. It operates across multiple U.S. markets and focuses on small and medium-sized businesses.
